); changes to the network name or passwo: ); changes to the network name or password apply at once when the hotspot is live.
A change takes effect on your next login: A change takes effect on your next login.
A coloured halo cast behind every window: A coloured halo cast behind every window
A custom image is dithered live. To bake:
A custom image is dithered live. To bake your own art into this gallery:
  ryodither <image> --out ~/Pictures/ryodecors
(needs Pillow; add --invert for a dark subject on a pale ground). Hand-tune any field in ~/.config/ryoku/profile.json. Full guide: docs/profile.md.
A fixed palette is set. Pick Follow, Lig: A fixed palette is set. Pick Follow, Light, Dark, or Mono to change it.
A horizontal swipe slides to the next wo: A horizontal swipe slides to the next workspace.
A horizontal swipe slides to the next workspace; unlocks the rows below
A key is saved. Enter a new one to repla: A key is saved. Enter a new one to replace it.
A landscape PNG or JPG, ideally 1600 px: A landscape PNG or JPG, ideally 1600 px wide or more. It is cropped to a wide banner and dimmed; drag the preview to pick the part that shows.
A light touchpad tap counts as a left cl: A light touchpad tap counts as a left click
A soft drop shadow under every window: A soft drop shadow under every window
A tap counts as a click; two fingers rig: A tap counts as a click; two fingers right, three middle.
A tap is a click: one finger left, two r: A tap is a click: one finger left, two right, three middle
ALSO SETS · TAP TO EXCLUDE (behavior tog: ALSO SETS · TAP TO EXCLUDE (behavior toggles)
AMD power_dpm_force_performance_level: a: AMD power_dpm_force_performance_level: auto, low, or high
About 600 MB for the engine and runtimes: About 600 MB for the engine and runtimes, before any model.
Add an API key below before you can swit: Add an API key below before you can switch this on.
Adds a bar with the window's title above: Adds a bar with the window's title above it, applies on Save
Adds a curve with a stock ease shape and: Adds a curve with a stock ease shape and selects it for editing
Adds close and fullscreen buttons, traff: Adds close and fullscreen buttons, traffic-light style
Adds seconds to the readout, the face up: Adds seconds to the readout, the face updates every second
Adds today's date beside or under the ti: Adds today's date beside or under the time, styled by Date style
Align (drag the \\\"popout\\\" chip alon: Align (drag the \"popout\" chip along the chosen edge)
All window fading as one group: open, cl: All window fading as one group: open, close, dim, shadow
Also blur behind the special (scratchpad: Also blur behind the special (scratchpad) workspace
Also drops the bead's live blur layer, s: Also drops the bead's live blur layer, so an idle bar costs no GPU frames
Also set the login screen and TTY keymap: Also set the login screen and TTY keymap via localectl.
Animates a window when it gains focus; a: Animates a window when it gains focus; applies on Save
Animates the weather art; off shows a st: Animates the weather art; off shows a still picture of the conditions
Applied to the login screen and console.
Art beside the readout: an image, ASCII: Art beside the readout: an image, ASCII art, the distro logo, or none
Banner image behind the home card; empty: Banner image behind the home card; empty falls back to the shipped art
Base a new split on the active window, n: Base a new split on the active window, not the one under the cursor
Behaviour bundled beyond the look; every: Behaviour bundled beyond the look; every chip applies unless tapped off
Bezier curve P1 x (first control point,: Bezier curve P1 x (first control point, X)
Bezier curve P1 y (first control point,: Bezier curve P1 y (first control point, Y)
Bezier curve P2 x (second control point,: Bezier curve P2 x (second control point, X)
Bezier curve P2 y (second control point,: Bezier curve P2 y (second control point, Y)
Blank columns between the terminal edge: Blank columns between the terminal edge and the art
Blends the border color on focus change: Blends the border color on focus change instead of snapping
Blur behind popups and menus, not just w: Blur behind popups and menus, not just windows
Blur radius per pass, larger smears the: Blur radius per pass, larger smears the background further
Blur samples the wallpaper only, skippin: Blur samples the wallpaper only, skipping windows underneath
Blur the backdrop even under fully trans: Blur the backdrop even under fully transparent regions
Blur what shows through a transparent bo: Blur what shows through a transparent border image
Blur with glass-like refraction on windo: Blur with glass-like refraction on windows, applies on Save
Blur, dim, or restyle shell surfaces per: Blur, dim, or restyle shell surfaces per namespace; applied only on Save
Blurs what shows through the bar backgro: Blurs what shows through the bar background
Blurs whatever shows through translucent: Blurs whatever shows through translucent windows and surfaces
Boosts colour saturation seen through th: Boosts colour saturation seen through the blur
Briefly flashes, bounces, or slides a wi: Briefly flashes, bounces, or slides a window when it gains focus. Applies on Save.
Browse and install shell plugins and ext: Browse and install shell plugins and extras bundles. Plugins add live surfaces (frame popouts, desktop widgets); bundles are curated sets of tools that install through a terminal. Managing what is already installed lives on Add-ons.
Bundles a chosen image into the rice; it: Bundles a chosen image into the rice; it also becomes its tile preview
Cache blur for a large speedup, leave on: Cache blur for a large speedup, leave on unless you see artifacts
Characters per second while a key is hel: Characters per second while a key is held down
Characters per second while a key is held.
Chassis fan and power envelope: quiet, b: Chassis fan and power envelope: quiet, balanced, or performance (ACPI platform_profile)
Check the terminal for details, then try: Check the terminal for details, then try again.
Clears every animation override and cust: Clears every animation override and custom curve; Save makes it stick
Clicking with 2 or 3 fingers means right: Clicking with 2 or 3 fingers means right or middle click, not corners
Colored halo drawn around window edges: Colored halo drawn around window edges
Coloured dots on the bar: red closes, gr: Coloured dots on the bar: red closes, green goes fullscreen
Colours are derived from your wallpaper: Colours are derived from your wallpaper and update when it changes; Follow also tints the window frame.
Comma-separated XKB tweaks, e.g. caps:es: Comma-separated XKB tweaks, e.g. caps:escape to remap Caps Lock
Commands Hyprland runs once at login, af: Commands Hyprland runs once at login, after the base Ryoku autostart (e.g. a tray applet or a sync client). Saved to your config; new commands start at your next login.
Commands run once at every session start: Commands run once at every session start
Constant plays everywhere, variable is s: Constant plays everywhere, variable is smaller but may import as 30fps
Constant plays everywhere; variable is s: Constant plays everywhere; variable is smaller but may import as 30fps.
Continuing past the end opens an empty w: Continuing past the end opens an empty workspace instead of stopping
Corner curve shape: 2 is a circle, highe: Corner curve shape: 2 is a circle, higher flattens toward square
Corner curve: 2 is a true circle, higher: Corner curve: 2 is a true circle, higher flattens into a squircle
Corner radius of windows in pixels, 0 ke: Corner radius of windows in pixels, 0 keeps corners square
Corner rounding of OSDs and toasts: Corner rounding of OSDs and toasts
Corner rounding of the frame itself: Corner rounding of the frame itself
Count the border as part of the window s: Count the border as part of the window size instead of drawn outside it
Current conditions and temperature on th: Current conditions and temperature on the home card; off shows the date
Current conditions and temperature on the home card; off shows the date.
Cursor leans into motion; applies on Sav: Cursor leans into motion; applies on Save, not the live preview
Curve overrides saved by name; every ani: Curve overrides saved by name; every animation using one follows it
Custom bezier curves for overrides; reus: Custom bezier curves for overrides; reusing a base name replaces it
Custom rules layered over the ones Ryoku: Custom rules layered over the ones Ryoku ships. Match a window by its class and/or title, then pick what to do: float a dialog, pin a video, force it opaque, and more. Changes apply when you save.
Custom shortcuts layered over the ones R: Custom shortcuts layered over the ones Ryoku ships and kept in the Hub, so they show in the Shortcuts legend and get conflict-checked. Click record and press the combo -- even SUPER + Q is captured safely -- or type it the way Hyprland writes it, e.g. SUPER + J. Binds hand-written in ~/.config/hypr/user.lua never appear here and are not conflict-checked.
Cuts blue light for the evening, stays o: Cuts blue light for the evening, stays on across sessions
Cuts blue light for the evening, stays on across sessions.
DRAG A DISPLAY TO ARRANGE IT · EDGES SNA: DRAG A DISPLAY TO ARRANGE IT · EDGES SNAP
Darken the parent while a modal dialog i: Darken the parent while a modal dialog is open
Darkens every window except the focused: Darkens every window except the focused one
Deletes a custom curve; on a built-in, d: Deletes a custom curve; on a built-in, drops your override instead
Desktop widgets are moved, resized and h: Desktop widgets are moved, resized and hidden on the wallpaper. Drag the tile, or right-click it for its menu.
Detect connected displays, drag to arran: Detect connected displays, drag to arrange them to scale, and tune resolution, scale, rotation, colour (including HDR) and mirroring per monitor. Apply writes the layout to your live session and persists it; save a named profile to restore this arrangement when you plug the same displays in again.
Disable blur - shell effects and the com: Disable blur - shell effects and the compositor backdrop blur (the biggest GPU saving)
Disable shadows - shell drop shadows and: Disable shadows - shell drop shadows and the compositor window shadow
Distance from the layout's left edge; dr: Distance from the layout's left edge; dragging the tile sets it too
Distance from the layout's top edge; dra: Distance from the layout's top edge; dragging the tile sets it too
Download a model below before you can sw: Download a model below before you can switch this on.
Drag a window border or gap to resize in: Drag a window border or gap to resize instead of using a keybind
Drag to resize at window edges: Drag to resize at window edges
Dragged floating windows snap to screen: Dragged floating windows snap to screen edges and other windows
Dragged floating windows stick to screen: Dragged floating windows stick to screen edges and other windows
Dragged windows overshoot and spring bac: Dragged windows overshoot and spring back when they settle
Dragged windows overshoot and spring back, needs animations on
Draw the rounded border around the scree: Draw the rounded border around the screen
Draw the shadow with hard edges instead: Draw the shadow with hard edges instead of a soft falloff
Draws a title bar on every window; appli: Draws a title bar on every window; applies on Save
Drop the frame rate when nothing is play: Drop the frame rate when nothing is playing
Duration in tenths of a second: 10 is on: Duration in tenths of a second: 10 is one second, higher is slower
EVERY THREAD ENDS AT A BLADE.
Each add-on defines its own; changes app: Each add-on defines its own; changes apply to the desktop live
Each shadow is its own GPU blur pass, so: Each shadow is its own GPU blur pass, so flat surfaces draw much cheaper
Each shadow is its own GPU blur pass, so flat surfaces draw much cheaper.
Easing curve it follows; edit or add sha: Easing curve it follows; edit or add shapes in the Curves section
Edge thicknesses as left,right,top,botto: Edge thicknesses as left,right,top,bottom in pixels
Empties the list in one go; Revert can b: Empties the list in one go; Revert can bring it back until you Save
Entrance and exit motion: scale from cen: Entrance and exit motion: scale from centre, slide, or GNOME style
Environment variables for the Hyprland s: Environment variables for the Hyprland session, layered over the base. Add a NAME and value (e.g. MOZ_ENABLE_WAYLAND = 1); they take full effect at next login.
Every desktop shortcut in one place. App: Every desktop shortcut in one place. Apps sets what the launcher keys open (browser, terminal, editor, files, notes) and rebinds those keys; System rebinds the built-in shortcuts; Custom layers your own. Overlaps are flagged as you go.
Every key can be taught a new job -- Cap: Every key can be taught a new job -- Caps made useful, modifiers swapped, a compose key at hand.
Every motion here rides an easing curve,: Every motion here rides an easing curve, so nothing on the desktop just snaps into place.
Everything runs on this machine. The dae: Everything runs on this machine. The daemon binds 127.0.0.1 only — nothing you do here leaves the box.
Extra gap between workspaces while swipi: Extra gap between workspaces while swiping between them
Extra layout kept loaded; pick a chord b: Extra layout kept loaded; pick a chord below to switch between the two
Fade-in of opening windows; off, they ap: Fade-in of opening windows; off, they appear at full opacity
Fade-in of shell surfaces as they appear: Fade-in of shell surfaces as they appear (launcher, panels, menus)
Fade-out of closing windows; off, they c: Fade-out of closing windows; off, they cut out at full opacity
Fade-out of shell surfaces as they close: Fade-out of shell surfaces as they close (launcher, panels, menus)
Fades the whole widget; 20% is the floor: Fades the whole widget; 20% is the floor so it never fully disappears
Faithful to Jules3182's dark capsules, o: Faithful to Jules3182's dark capsules, or Ryoku-native square grainy chips
Faithful to ilyamiro, or Ryoku-native: t: Faithful to ilyamiro, or Ryoku-native: the frame wraps square grainy islands
Falloff sharpness, 1 to 4: higher fades: Falloff sharpness, 1 to 4: higher fades the shadow out faster
Figurative art is AI-generated at dev ti: Figurative art is AI-generated at dev time and graded by hand.
Film-grain matte over the shell and the: Film-grain matte over the shell and the apps behind it; 0 turns it off
Filters the frame when scaling, off keep: Filters the frame when scaling, off keeps pixel art crisp
Filters the picture when scaled, off kee: Filters the picture when scaled, off keeps hard pixel edges
Fine-tune layer-shell surfaces (the bar,: Fine-tune layer-shell surfaces (the bar, launcher, notifications) by namespace: blur or dim them, drop their animations, or show them above the lockscreen. Applied on Save, not live; a namespace that matches nothing has no effect.
Finger travel for a full switch; lower f: Finger travel for a full switch; lower flips sooner.
Finger travel in pixels for a full switc: Finger travel in pixels for a full switch; lower flips with less motion
Fingers for the workspace swipe, values: Fingers for the workspace swipe, values below 3 clamp to 3
Flag a Hyprland scratchpad while one is: Flag a Hyprland scratchpad while one is open
Flash dips opacity, Bounce shrinks and s: Flash dips opacity, Bounce shrinks and springs, Slide nudges it
Flat ties pointer travel to hand travel;: Flat ties pointer travel to hand travel; Adaptive speeds up quick moves
Flat ties travel to the hand; Adaptive s: Flat ties travel to the hand; Adaptive speeds quick moves.
Focused window border, ignored while the: Focused window border, ignored while the theme follows the wallpaper
Force resizing from one corner, 0 is off: Force resizing from one corner, 0 is off, 1 to 4 pick a corner
Forces every freeze, reduce and disable: Forces every freeze, reduce and disable switch on; unloads stay manual
Frame colour of the focused window, only: Frame colour of the focused window, only with a fixed palette
Frame colour of unfocused windows, only: Frame colour of unfocused windows, only with a fixed palette
Frame surface opacity over the wallpaper: Frame surface opacity over the wallpaper
Frames captured per second, higher is sm: Frames captured per second, higher is smoother but files are larger
Frames captured per second; higher is sm: Frames captured per second; higher is smoother but files are larger.
Free %1 from the desktop and bind it to: Free %1 from the desktop and bind it to vfio so a virtual machine can own it for near-native performance. This sets up the host only; you run the VM yourself (libvirt + Looking Glass). Everyday VMs in ryovm need none of this.
Frees about 250 MB after a minute hidden: Frees about 250 MB after a minute hidden; next Super+Tab cold-starts it
Frees about 250 MB after a minute hidden; the next Super+Tab cold-starts it.
Frees about 250 MB after a minute hidden; the next open cold-starts
Frees about 250 MB after a minute hidden; the next open cold-starts.
Frees the Super+G board's memory a minut: Frees the Super+G board's memory a minute after it closes; the next open cold-starts
Frees the Super+G board's memory a minute after it closes; the next open cold-starts.
Freeze the glowing bead animation while: Freeze the glowing bead animation while the bar is idle
Freeze the visualiser when no audio is p: Freeze the visualiser when no audio is playing
From installed icon sets, applies now an: From installed icon sets, applies now and to newly opened apps
Frosted-glass blur behind translucent wi: Frosted-glass blur behind translucent windows and the shell
Frosted-glass look for windows; applies: Frosted-glass look for windows; applies on Save
Frosts the desktop behind the open palet: Frosts the desktop behind the open palette, even with blur off globally
Frosts the desktop behind the open palette, even with blur off globally. 0 keeps it sharp.
GPU clock and fan control, gated behind: GPU clock and fan control, gated behind a per-session warning; can misbehave, resets on reboot
GPU encoding barely loads the CPU, pick: GPU encoding barely loads the CPU, pick CPU if the GPU encoder fails
GPU encoding barely loads the CPU; pick: GPU encoding barely loads the CPU; pick CPU if the GPU encoder fails.
GPU encoding is fast and barely touches: GPU encoding is fast and barely touches your CPU. CPU is a fallback if the GPU encoder misbehaves.
GPU power budget in watts, applied live: GPU power budget in watts, applied live for this session (NVIDIA nvidia-smi, AMD sysfs cap)
Generate higher-quality translations, or: Generate higher-quality translations, or a language Ryoku doesn't ship, with an LLM. Ryoku creates ~/.config/ryoku/i18n-llm.json on login; paste your Anthropic (console.anthropic.com) or OpenAI (platform.openai.com/api-keys) key into it, then Generate. Results layer over the built-in translations for the selected language.
Give one app its own look, layered on to: Give one app its own look, layered on top of the global Appearance. Add it (or pick from an open window), match it by its window class and an optional title, then override only what you want: everything left on Inherit keeps following the global. Changes apply as a Hyprland window rule when you save. Example: make a browser fully opaque, or a terminal square-cornered.
Grab a window's edge with the mouse to r: Grab a window's edge with the mouse to resize it
Grain mixed into the blur to hide color: Grain mixed into the blur to hide color banding
Grain over blurred areas, hides gradient: Grain over blurred areas, hides gradient banding
Grows or shrinks the tiled picture aroun: Grows or shrinks the tiled picture around each window
H.264 plays anywhere, HEVC and AV1 are c: H.264 plays anywhere, HEVC and AV1 are crisper, AV1 needs a newer GPU
H.264 plays anywhere; HEVC and AV1 are c: H.264 plays anywhere; HEVC and AV1 are crisper, AV1 needs a newer GPU.
Halts the idle animation when no audio p: Halts the idle animation when no audio plays; its repaints otherwise leak memory over time.
Halts the idle animation, whose repaints: Halts the idle animation, whose repaints otherwise leak memory over time
Hardware backlight, applied at once, flo: Hardware backlight, applied at once, floors at 5% to stay visible
Hardware backlight, applied at once, floors at 5% to stay visible.
Hide desktop widgets while windows cover: Hide desktop widgets while windows cover the desktop (frees their memory; they reappear on an empty desktop)
Higher framerate is smoother (120 gets c: Higher framerate is smoother (120 gets closer to a high-refresh panel); higher quality and HEVC/AV1 are crisper but larger. Constant framerate plays and edits correctly everywhere; variable is smaller but can look choppy or import as 30fps.
Higher pulls the shadow in tight, lower: Higher pulls the shadow in tight, lower leaves a wide haze
Higher settings look crisper but make la: Higher settings look crisper but make larger files
Higher settings look crisper but make larger files.
Higher values render everything larger,: Higher values render everything larger, leaving less desktop space
Highlight colour: wallust follows the wa: Highlight colour: wallust follows the wallpaper, mono stays greyscale
Hit Scan to discover nearby devices.
Hold a mark at each bar's peak: Hold a mark at each bar's peak
Hold your modifiers and tap the key. Esc: Hold your modifiers and tap the key. Esc cancels.

How fast a held key repeats, and the pau: How fast a held key repeats, and the pause before it starts.

How focus follows the pointer; Loose kee: How focus follows the pointer; Loose keeps typing put.

How rounded window corners are, 0 keeps: How rounded window corners are, 0 keeps them square

How strongly the glass blurs whatever is: How strongly the glass blurs whatever is behind it
How the GNOME keyring unlocks your saved: How the GNOME keyring unlocks your saved passwords and secrets at sign-in: unlock on login, never ask, or ask each time. keyring secrets passwords unlock sign-in
How the date sits with the time: inline,: How the date sits with the time: inline, as a badge, or stacked below

Hybrid keeps the built-in GPU primary fo: Hybrid keeps the built-in GPU primary for battery; apps can still use %1 on demand.
Hyprland-style combo plus an action; the: Hyprland-style combo plus an action; the command field is for Run command
Ignore the touchpad while you type so a: Ignore the touchpad while you type so a palm cannot nudge it.

Images from ~/Pictures/Wallpapers, picki: Images from ~/Pictures/Wallpapers, picking one rethemes the desktop
Inherit follows the global Appearance. S: Inherit follows the global Appearance. Switch to Custom to set this app's own value.
Inherit follows the global. Off forces t: Inherit follows the global. Off forces the effect off for this app. Force opaque removes transparency entirely (overrides Opacity).
Install a rice from the community store,: Install a rice from the community store, then apply it from My rices. A rice built for a different Ryoku version still applies; it is reconciled to yours.
Installs an exported rice folder as a lo: Installs an exported rice folder as a local rice; the slug is de-duped
Keep a slow wave moving when nothing is: Keep a slow wave moving when nothing is playing
Keep the NVIDIA driver initialised so th: Keep the NVIDIA driver initialised so the GPU stays responsive
Keep the split direction when windows cl: Keep the split direction when windows close and reopen
Keyboard layout and remaps, pointer and: Keyboard layout and remaps, pointer and touchpad behaviour, and key repeat for the Hyprland session. Edits preview live; nothing is written until you save.
Kills the frosted-glass look everywhere;: Kills the frosted-glass look everywhere; Hyprland reloads to apply it now
Kills the frosted-glass look everywhere; Hyprland reloads to apply it now.
Kills the whole process after 30s of sil: Kills the whole process after 30s of silence, reclaiming around 250 MB
Kills the whole process after 30s of silence, reclaiming around 250 MB.
LAYOUT (band skins: noctalia, caelestia,: LAYOUT (band skins: noctalia, caelestia, aegis, stele)
Layer-shell name to match, e.g. launcher: Layer-shell name to match, e.g. launcher; no match means no effect

Lines of text the art covers; the col un: Lines of text the art covers; the col unit here means character cells

Login screen and TTY keymap status: Login screen and TTY keymap status
Low power mode - strip every heavy effec: Low power mode - strip every heavy effect at once (blur, shadows, animations). The potato switch: implies all four toggles below, so a weak GPU runs the shell lag-free.
Lower Kelvin is warmer, saved only while: Lower Kelvin is warmer, saved only while the light is on
Lower Kelvin is warmer, saved only while the light is on.
Make this the primary display: puts it a: Make this the primary display: puts it at the global origin, Hyprland's cursor-home / reference corner

Original keeps Ryoku's grainy monochrome: Original keeps Ryoku's grainy monochrome look for the Hub, pill and widgets. Matugen recolours Ryoku's own UI with the Material 3 palette.
Overclocking, undervolting and fan contr: Overclocking, undervolting and fan control can freeze the GPU or the desktop. Every change is per session and clears on reboot; if the screen misbehaves, reboot to recover.
Paint the audio spectrum on the desktop: Paint the audio spectrum on the desktop
Panel drawn behind the widget; pick none: Panel drawn behind the widget; pick none to sit right on the wallpaper

That keyring is locked with a password. Enter it to switch it to no-password, or start fresh (your old keyring is backed up, never deleted).
